Do not substitute the builder or a later restoration architect. Do not include contact details or suggest sending a message.

fetch_primary.title: Redwick Rowing Boathouse original design dossier
fetch_primary.content: The signed design dossier credits Celeste Arnaud as lead architect for the original Redwick Rowing Boathouse. It names North Quay Works as the builder and does not identify a structural engineer.
